name: Slice & Bake Sugar Cookies - More Make a Mix
recipeInstructions:
BEFORE BAKING, SPRINKLE WITH GRANULATED SUGAR (IF DESIRED):
Cut four 14x12-inch pieces of waxed paper or plastic wrap; set aside.
In a large bowl, cream margarine and sugar. Beat in eggs, vanilla, and lemon extract until light and fluffy.
In a separate bowl, combine flour and baking soda.
Gradually stir the flour mixture into the egg mixture until blended.
Divide dough into 4 equal pieces. Shape each piece into an 8-to-10-inch roll.
Wrap each roll in one piece of waxed paper or plastic wrap.
Place wrapped rolls in a large, airtight container.
Store in freezer for up to 6 months.
TO BAKE:
Preheat oven to 350°F.
Lightly grease two baking sheets.
Remove frozen dough from the freezer and cut into 1/4-inch slices.
Place the slices on the prepared baking sheets, spacing them about 1/2 inch apart.
Bake for 8 to 10 minutes or until the edges become slightly brown.
Allow cookies to cool before removing from the sheets.
